subject: Write regression tests for portal URL and email template changes
description:
Write two test files:

1. `tests/api/quotes-share-url-portal.test.ts` - Test portal URL generation:
   - share-url returns external portal URL when CLIENT_PORTAL_URL is set
   - URL format is `https://portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com/{id}` (no `/quote/` prefix)
   - Hash fragments work (#menu, #contract)
   - Fallback to default `https://portal.mtlcraftcocktails.com` when CLIENT_PORTAL_URL is not set
   - Uses same test patterns as existing `tests/api/quotes-share-url.test.ts`

2. `tests/hooks/useProposalActions-email.test.ts` - Test email template:
   - `handleCreateQuote` with `sendToClient=true` sends branded email (not bare text)
   - `handleSendProposal` sends branded email with portal link
   - Email contains both EN and FR text (bilingual)
   - Email contains event details (date, headcount, event type)
   - Email contains CTA button with portal URL
   - Uses same test patterns as existing `tests/hooks/useProposalActions.test.ts`

Mock patterns: vi.mock for authMiddleware, portalAccess, supabaseClient, apiFetch, emailService.
Follow existing test file naming conventions and vitest patterns.
